name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-20
title: Centralize [rabbit] print registry: messages.json + shared renderer helper
description: All [rabbit] message definitions are currently scattered across hook .py files. Centralize into a single data file and shared renderer. Deliverables: (1) rabbit-print-messages.json in contract/schemas: defines brand prefix '[🐇 rabbit 🐇]', bar '━━━', and per-message entries with id/icon/color/text fields. (2) rabbit-print.py shared renderer in contract/scripts: rabbit_print(id, **kwargs) reads the registry, composes '[🐇 rabbit 🐇] ICON ━━━ TEXT ━━━ ICON' with ANSI color, returns string. (3) rabbit-print.schema.json updated to reference new messages registry. Prerequisite for RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-19 and TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-11 which will call the renderer.
